records.ety: [F., fr. Sp. julepe, fr. Ar. & Per. julāb, jullāb, fr. Per. gulāb rose water and julep; gul rose + āb water.]

defs: A refreshing drink flavored with aromatic herbs
a sweet, demulcent, acidulous, or mucilaginous mixture, used as a vehicle.
quotes: Honey in woods, juleps in brooks.

defs: An alcoholic beverage composed of brandy, whisky, or some other spirituous liquor, with sugar, pounded ice, and sprigs of mint; -- called also mint julep.
